compare.heroSubtitle: Pick a left and right file. We parse both in your browser (up to {mb} MB each, max {maxRows} rows loaded per file). Align rows by position or by a key column, optionally ignore spaces or case, sync scrolling, highlight differing cells, filter to changed rows, and download a CSV diff report.
compare.dropHint: Drop a CSV here or browse
compare.needBoth: Load both CSV files to see the comparison and read-only grids.
compare.summaryColumnsReordered: Columns share the same fields; the right file was reordered to match the left for comparison.
compare.summaryStructureMismatch: Column headers or fields differ, so automatic cell-by-cell diff is disabled. Use the grids for a visual comparison.
compare.summaryIdentical: No differing cells in overlapping rows.
compare.optMatchColumnsByName: Match columns by header (same fields, different order)
compare.warnMatchColumnsOff: Turn this on to compare cell-by-cell when only column order differs.
compare.optAlignByKey: Match rows by a key column (instead of line number)
compare.exportDiffUnavailable: Enable a valid column layout to export a diff report.

csvToJson.heroTitle: CSV to JSON viewer and editor
csvToJson.heroSubtitle: Import a CSV (up to {mb} MB, max {maxRows} rows loaded). The left panel is a read-only grid; the right panel is JSON keyed by your column headers. Edit JSON and apply to refresh the grid, or reset JSON from the current CSV.
csvToJson.fileHint: Header row required, same rules as the main CSV viewer.
csvToJson.resetFromCsvToast: JSON reset to match the loaded CSV.
csvToJson.excelBatchSubtitle: Add up to {max} CSV files, convert them, then download each Excel file one by one.
csvToJson.excelBatchTooManyFiles: You can add up to {max} files.
csvToJson.jsonHint: Full JSON editor: tree mode with expand/collapse, text and table modes, search, undo/redo, sort, transform, and repair (use the built-in menu). Your data must stay a JSON array of objects to match the CSV grid. Use Apply to rebuild the grid after edits.
csvToJson.jsonInvalid: Invalid JSON. Fix syntax and try again.

jsonToCsv.heroSubtitle: Import a JSON file (up to {mb} MB, max {maxRows} rows loaded). The left panel lets you edit a JSON array of objects; the right panel shows generated CSV output and a read-only grid preview.
jsonToCsv.dropHint: Drop a JSON file here or browse
jsonToCsv.fileHint: Use a JSON array of objects, with one object per row and consistent keys.
jsonToCsv.jsonHint: Your data must remain a JSON array of objects to convert into CSV rows. Use Apply after editing.
jsonToCsv.csvHint: CSV output is regenerated from the JSON panel after each Apply.
jsonToCsv.jsonInvalid: Invalid JSON. Fix syntax and try again.

jsonToExcel.heroSubtitle: Import a JSON file (up to {mb} MB, max {maxRows} rows loaded). Edit a JSON array of objects, apply changes, preview rows, then download Excel.
jsonToExcel.dropHint: Drop a JSON file here or browse
jsonToExcel.fileHint: Use a JSON array of objects, with one object per row and consistent keys.
jsonToExcel.jsonHint: Your data must remain a JSON array of objects. Use Apply to refresh the preview.
jsonToExcel.previewHint: This preview shows the rows that will be exported to Excel.
jsonToExcel.jsonInvalid: Invalid JSON. Fix syntax and try again.

csvToExcel.heroSubtitle: Add CSV files (up to {mb} MB each, max {maxRows} rows loaded per file), convert them, then download each Excel file one by one.
csvToExcel.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop CSV files here, or click to browse
csvToExcel.dropzoneHint: CSV only (.csv or plain-text comma-separated) · up to {mb} MB per file · header row required · max {maxRows} rows shown per file

xlsToCsvBatch.heroTitle: Conversor em lote Excel para CSV
xlsToCsvBatch.heroSubtitle: Add Excel files (up to {mb} MB each, max {maxRows} rows loaded from the selected sheet). Convert them in your browser, then download each CSV one by one.
xlsToCsvBatch.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop Excel files here, or click to browse
xlsToCsvBatch.dropzoneHint: Excel only (.xls/.xlsx/.xlsm/.xlsb) · up to {mb} MB per file · header handling optional · max {maxRows} rows loaded per file

xlsToCsv.heroSubtitle: Open an Excel workbook (up to {mb} MB, max {maxRows} rows loaded from the selected sheet). Parsing runs in your browser with SheetJS—no server upload. Pick a sheet, set header handling, then view and edit directly in the grid.
xlsToCsv.dropHint: Drop an Excel file here or browse
xlsToCsv.fileHint: Supports .xlsx, .xlsm, .xlsb, and legacy .xls. Choose which sheet row holds column names, or turn off headers to use Column 1, Column 2, …
xlsToCsv.headerToggleAria: Use a sheet row as CSV column headers
xlsToCsv.csvHint: CSV is generated from the selected sheet. Download or copy to use it elsewhere.
xlsToCsv.previewHint: Read-only grid: sort, filter, and search—same limits as the row cap above.

landing.heroTitle: Visualizador e editor de CSV moderno, gratuito e seguro.
landing.heroSubtitle: Solte um CSV na grelha: ordene, filtre, pesquise, edite, cole, desfaça/refaça e adicione ou remova linhas. Os dados ficam neste dispositivo e são restaurados quando voltar.
landing.dropzoneTitle: Arraste um CSV para aqui ou clique para procurar
landing.dropzoneHint: Apenas CSV (.csv ou texto separado por vírgulas) · até {mb} MB · linha de cabeçalho obrigatória · máx. {maxRows} linhas
landing.readError: Ocorreu um erro ao ler este ficheiro.
landing.sampleMissing: Não foi possível carregar o ficheiro de amostra. Confirme que public/samples/products-10000.csv existe.
landing.sampleError: Não foi possível carregar os dados de amostra.

marketing.privacyBody: O ficheiro é analisado neste dispositivo; não o enviamos para os nossos servidores. As edições ficam no armazenamento local do navegador. Limpar remove-as deste dispositivo. Este site pode mostrar anúncios.
marketing.trustedHeading: Usado e confiado por equipas líderes
marketing.trustedSrIntro: Logótipos num carrossel (cada um abre o site da marca num novo separador):

blog.metaDescription: Guias e artigos sobre fluxos CSV, grelhas no navegador, análise com privacidade e como usar {name}.
blog.label: Blog
blog.title: Guias e insights
blog.intro: Ajuda prática para CSV no navegador e contexto sobre privacidade, ferramentas e como as equipas revêem dados em 2025. {count} artigos.
blog.nextGuidesBlurb: Tópicos que planeamos transformar em artigos completos.

pseo.guidesHubTitle: Guias sobre CSV e grelhas de dados
pseo.guidesHubDescription: Guias estruturados para abrir CSV grandes, limpar exportações e usar o Table localmente antes de carregar folhas ou sincronizar com o ERP.
pseo.toolsHubTitle: Ferramentas e hubs de fluxo de trabalho
pseo.toolsHubDescription: Páginas alinhadas à intenção para revisão de CSV no navegador, exportações de e-commerce e fluxos relacionados, com dados estruturados e metadados consistentes.
pseo.contentLocaleNotice: O texto principal está em inglês. A interface segue o idioma que escolheu para navegação e acessibilidade.

csv.importCapped: (import capped at {imported} of {total} rows from file)
csv.clearDialogDescription: This removes the loaded CSV and your edits from this browser's storage on this device. You can import a file again afterward.
csv.needOneColumn: You need at least one data column.
